CVE-2019-19920.title: sa-exim 4.2.1 allows attackers to execute arbitrary code if they  ...
CVE-2019-19920.summary: sa-exim 4.2.1 allows attackers to execute arbitrary code if they can write a .cf file or a rule. This occurs because Greylisting.pm relies on eval (rather than direct parsing and/or use of the taint feature). This issue is similar to CVE-2018-11805.
